data.current_summary: Forward a transaction event from a charging station
data.current_description: Forward events about significant charging session activities (start, stop, state changes) to the Jedlix Smart Charging platform.
data.summary_suggestion: Forward charging session transaction event to platform
data.description_suggestion: Forwards OCPP-formatted transaction events from a charging station to the Jedlix Smart Charging platform. Accepts events for significant charging session activities including session start, stop, and state changes. Requires the EVSE UID and payload protocol format as path parameters. Returns a success confirmation upon receipt. This operation enables real-time tracking of charging session lifecycle events for smart charging optimization.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity on input requirements (EVSE UID, payload protocol parameters), expected response format, and the operational impact of forwarding these events. Enhanced version specifies OCPP context, clarifies path parameters, indicates response behavior, and explains the purpose for AI agent decision-making about when to invoke this operation.

data.current_summary: Forward meter values from a charging station
data.current_description: Forward important measurements (energy, power, SoC) to the Jedlix Smart Charging platform for charging profile optimization and settlement.
data.summary_suggestion: Forward meter measurements for charging optimization
data.description_suggestion: Forwards OCPP-formatted meter value measurements from a charging station to the Jedlix Smart Charging platform. Accepts periodic measurements including energy consumption, power output, and state of charge (SoC) data. Requires the EVSE UID and payload protocol format as path parameters. Returns a success confirmation upon receipt. This operation enables continuous monitoring of charging metrics for real-time charging profile optimization and accurate settlement calculations.
data.reasoning: Original description omits input parameter requirements (EVSE UID, payload protocol), response format, and specific operational effects. Enhanced version clarifies OCPP context, specifies required path parameters, indicates response behavior, and explains how meter data feeds into both optimization and settlement processes for better AI agent understanding of operation purpose and usage context.
